summary: Guardian Page session persistence bug fix VERIFIED. Tested Quick Action (Analyze Vault) flow: click action → navigate away → return. Chat view correctly persists after navigation. The fix ensures single session ID is used consistently via closure in startNewChat function.
passed_tests: Quick Action (Analyze Vault) opens chat view with thinking indicator
Chat view persists after navigating to Dashboard and returning to Guardian
Session ID correctly maintained in localStorage (ega_active_session)
Back button correctly clears session and returns to landing page
Recent Conversations list shows previous sessions
New Chat button opens fresh chat view

quick_action_session_persistence.details: Clicking Analyze Vault → navigating to Dashboard → returning to Guardian shows chat view (not landing). Session ID from startNewChat closure is correctly passed to sendMessage.

back_button_clears_session.details: Clicking back arrow in chat view returns to landing page and clears ega_active_session from localStorage

session_resume.details: On mount, Guardian page checks localStorage for ega_active_session and calls resumeSession to restore chat history

code_fix_verified.fix_description: startNewChat now accepts optional 'action' parameter (line 304). When Quick Action buttons call startNewChat(null, key), the function generates newId, stores it in localStorage, and passes the SAME newId to sendMessage via closure (line 317). Previously, Quick Actions called startNewChat() which stored ID_A, then setTimeout with sendMessage using Date.now() which generated ID_B.
key_lines: Line 304-319: startNewChat function with action parameter
Line 317: sendMessage('', action, newId) uses newId via closure

test_screenshots: .screenshots/01_guardian_landing.png - Landing page with hero title and Quick Actions
.screenshots/02_chat_view_active.png - Chat view with thinking indicator after Analyze Vault
.screenshots/03_after_return.png - Chat view persisted after navigation (shows 'Resuming conversation')
.screenshots/04_final_state.png - Landing page after back button click
context_for_next_testing_agent: Guardian page session persistence bug is fixed. Quick Actions now use single session ID via closure. The fix is in startNewChat function which passes newId to sendMessage. localStorage key 'ega_active_session' stores active session for resume on page revisit.
